news.headline: Shannon Bona & Julius Swolsky of Graystone Capital Advisors achieve record-breaking 4.02% CAP rate on Arby's in Conroe, TX.
news.summary: Graystone Capital Advisors, a top investment sales brokerage, has recently finalized the sale of an Arby's location in Conroe, TX. Shannon Bona, First Vice President, and Julius Swolsky, Managing Director, accomplished a remarkable feat by securing a record-breaking CAP Rate of 4.02% during the closing process. Representing the Seller, a private investor and repeat client from the West Coast, the agents successfully closed the deal for the Conroe, TX Arby's.

news.headline: McGrath RentCorp to attend Wolfe Research Small and Mid-Cap Conference on Dec 5, 2024. CEO and CFO to participate. (Numbers: Nasdaq: MGRC, Dec 5, 2024)
news.summary: Based in Livermore, California, McGrath RentCorp (Nasdaq: MGRC), a top business-to-business rental company in North America, shared that its CEO, Joe Hanna, and CFO, Keith Pratt, will attend investor meetings at the Wolfe Research Small and Mid-Cap Conference on December 5, 2024. McGrath RentCorp (Nasdaq: MGRC) is recognized for its prominent role in the North American rental industry.

news.headline: Fluor's CFO Joe Brennan retires; John Regan appointed as new CFO. 0 characters.
news.summary: Irving, Texas-based company announces Chief Financial Officer Joe Brennan's retirement. John Regan is appointed as the new CFO. The change in leadership comes as part of Fluor's ongoing efforts to strengthen its financial team.

news.headline: USPS released 2024 Post-Election Report, processed 99M+ ballots successfully, delivering them within one day on average.
news.summary: The 2024 General Election saw a record-breaking processing of over 99 million ballots. On average, ballots were swiftly delivered from voters to election officials within a single day. The United States Postal Service disclosed these findings in its 2024 Post-Election Analysis Report, marking a significant achievement in election efficiency.

news.headline: Sportradar's CFO to attend Morgan Stanley conference on Dec 4, 2024 at 2:15pm EST, accessible at investors.sportradar.com.
news.summary: In St. Gallen, Switzerland, on Dec. 02, 2024, Sportradar Group AG (NASDAQ: SRAD) revealed that Craig Felenstein, the Chief Financial Officer, is set to join the Morgan Stanley Consumer & Retail Conference on Dec. 4, 2024. The conference talk is scheduled for 2:15 pm Eastern Time, and interested parties can view the webcast at investors.sportradar.com. Sportradar, a prominent global sports technology firm, is dedicated to enhancing sports fan and bettor experiences.

news.summary: On December 2, 2024, Royce Micro-Cap Trust, Inc. announced a fourth quarter dividend of $0.21 per share for its Common Stock trading on NYSE-RMT. Shareholders have the option to receive this distribution in additional Common Stock shares or cash.

news.headline: Fox Corp CFO Steve Tomsic to join UBS Global Media and Communications Conference on Dec 9 at 12pm (Eastern). #FOX #UBS
news.summary: In a news release dated December 2, 2024, Fox Corporation revealed that their Chief Financial Officer, Steve Tomsic, is set to take part in the upcoming UBS Global Media and Communications Conference on December 9. The session is scheduled to commence at 12:00pm Eastern time and 9:00am Pacific time. Fox Corporation is listed on the Nasdaq stock exchange under the ticker symbols FOXA and FOX.

news.summary: Houston-based Summit Midstream Corporation, listed on NYSE as SMC, disclosed on Dec. 2, 2024, that both the company and its wholly owned subsidiary, Summit Midstream Partners, LP, obtained shareholder approval and finalized a prior transaction.

news.headline: Amgen to present at Citi's 2024 Global Healthcare Conference on Dec. 5, 2024 at 9:30 a.m. ET. Executives to discuss.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, Amgen (NASDAQ: AMGN) announced their participation in Citi's 2024 Global Healthcare Conference on December 5, 2024, at 9:30 a.m. ET. Peter Griffith, the executive vice president and chief financial officer, along with Jay Bradner, the executive vice president, will represent Amgen at the event.

news.headline: Rocky Mountain Chocolate Factory appoints Melvin Keating and Al Harper to its Board, replacing Starlette B. Johnson and Charlson Arnold.
news.summary: Rocky Mountain Chocolate Factory Inc. appointed Melvin Keating and Al Harper to its Board of Directors, replacing Starlette B. Johnson and Charlson Arnold, effective November 26, 2024. The company, known as RMCF and listed as Nasdaq: RMCF, operates as an international franchisor and producer of premium chocolates and confectionery items like gourmet caramel apples. The announcement was made on December 2, 2024, from Durango, Colorado.

news.headline: Thornburg Income Builder Opportunities Trust (NASDAQ: TBLD) announces $0.10417 per share monthly distribution on Dec. 20, 2024.
news.summary: Today, Thornburg Income Builder Opportunities Trust (NASDAQ: TBLD) declared a monthly distribution of $0.10417 per share on its common shares. This payment is set to be made on December 20, 2024 to common shareholders who are recorded as of December XX.

news.headline: Oracle to report Q2 FY2025 earnings on Dec 9, 2024, after market close. Announcement made from Austin, Texas.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, Oracle Corporation from Austin, Texas, stated that the earnings results for the second quarter of fiscal year 2025 will be disclosed on December 9, 2024, after the market closes. The announcement indicated that the information would be made public after the end of trading on Monday, December 9th.

news.headline: Vaxart finished enrolling 400 participants in Phase 2b study, 200 on their oral pill COVID-19 vaccine and 200 on mRNA vaccine.
news.summary: South San Francisco, California - Vaxart, Inc. declared on December 2, 2024, that the enrollment process for the initial group of participants in a Phase 2b clinical trial has concluded. The trial is assessing Vaxart’s oral pill COVID-19 vaccine candidate in comparison to an approved mRNA vaccine. The sentinel cohort, consisting of 400 individuals, with 200 given Vaxart’s COVID-19 vaccine and 200 provided with the approved mRNA vaccine. The study aims to evaluate the effectiveness of the oral pill vaccine against the mRNA vaccine.

news.headline: Abacus Life acquires FCF Advisors with $850 million in assets under management, expanding its investment offerings.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, Abacus Life, Inc. (NASDAQ: ABL) based in Orlando, Florida, completed the acquisition of FCF Advisors, a New York-based asset manager and index provider focusing on free cash flow investment strategies. FCF currently manages around $850 million in assets. This acquisition marks a notable achievement for Abacus as they continue to grow ABL Wealth and its range of products. Abacus is a global alternative asset manager that utilizes longevity data and actuarial technology to provide unique investment opportunities.

news.headline: Bank of America predicts S&P 500 to reach 6,666 by end of 2025, indicating a 10% increase from current levels. Analysts anticipate another good year for equities driven by corporate earnings growth.
news.summary: During a recent conference call, Bank of America analysts shared an optimistic forecast for stocks in 2025. The S&P 500 Index, represented by the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (NYSE: SPY), is projected to reach 6,666 by the end of the year, showing a 10% increase from current levels. This prediction is supported by expectations of productivity gains, resilient corporate earnings, and strategic sector rotation. Head of U.S. equity strategy at Bank of America, Savita Subramanian, highlighted the positive outlook stating, "Our forecast anticipates a transition from 666 in 2009 to 6,666 by 2025." This estimate indicates an annual return of around 10%, fueled by strong earnings growth and increased sector diversity. The 2025 outlook is heavily influenced by a projected 13% growth in corporate earnings. Subramanian mentioned that the focus for 2025 will be more on sector rotation rather than solely on investing in the index.

(Tokyo Prime: 2413) or an affiliate within the M3 group, is taking part in the Series A equity financing round of MEDIROM MOTHER Labs Inc., a MEDIROM subsidiary. NFES Technologies Inc. leads the Series A funding with a pre-money valuation of JPY9 billion. Further details can be accessed at the following link: https://medirom.co.jp/en/ir/20240824/6148.

news.headline: IPG Photonics acquires CleanLASER, accelerating entry into growing laser cleaning solutions market.
news.summary: The acquisition is expected to fast-track IPG's expansion into the rapidly growing market for laser cleaning solutions. This move comes as the company aims to capitalize on the increasing demand for advanced cleaning technologies. The acquisition deal amounts to approximately $XX million, highlighting the significant investment made by IPG in this sector. This strategic decision positions IPG to strengthen its presence in the market and enhance its competitive edge in providing innovative laser cleaning solutions.

news.summary: At its annual general meeting on November 22, 2024, Aduro Clean Technologies declared the election of all director nominees for the 2023/2024 term.

news.headline: Energy Income Fund (TSX: ENI.UN) to redeem 233,879 units at $1.9549 each, annual redemption details revealed.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, Energy Income Fund (TSX: ENI.UN) shared that 233,879 units of the Fund will be redeemed at a price of $1.9549 per unit. This annual redemption news was disclosed by the Fund in Toronto.

news.headline: Citadel Income Fund (TSX: CTF.UN) announces annual redemption of 311,515 units at $3.9201 per unit.
news.summary: In Toronto on December 2, 2024, Citadel Income Fund (TSX: CTF.UN) revealed details about the annual redemption of 311,515 units of the Fund. The redemption price per unit has been set at $3.9201.

news.headline: BTC price drops, but derivatives market stays strong. Traders' confidence seen in price action.
news.summary: Traders' confidence in the market can be seen through Bitcoin derivatives, indicating that the current price action is likely part of a consolidation phase. This suggests that investors are optimistic about the future of Bitcoin.

news.headline: Volato Group, Inc. launches patent-pending technology in aviation industry, utilizing underutilized aircraft for crypto mining, tapping into $2.4B market, with Bitcoin's price growth.
news.summary: Volato Group, Inc., traded on NYSE American as SOAR, based in Atlanta, is a prominent player in private aviation innovation. The company has revealed a cutting-edge, patent-pending technology that revolutionizes the way aircraft can generate income by utilizing unused aircraft resources for cryptocurrency mining. Initially submitted in 2023, this innovation has seen impressive gains due to the rise in Bitcoin value, indicating its ability to convert overlooked aviation resources into valuable digital assets. The system is set to operate automatically.

news.headline: Coinbase now supports Apple Pay for all Onramp apps, allowing seamless transactions with over 375 million users.
news.summary: In the latest report, it has been revealed that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.5%, which is a decrease of 0.2% from the previous month. This decrease signifies that 100,000 more individuals have found employment opportunities in the job market. The data also indicates that the economy has added 150,000 new jobs in various sectors, showing a positive trend in the overall employment landscape. Additionally, the average hourly wage has seen a slight increase of 2.5%, reflecting modest growth in income for workers. These numbers paint a promising picture of the current state of the job market and economic conditions.

news.headline: 83rd anniversary of Pearl Harbor attack commemorated on USCG Cutter WHEC-37 in Baltimore.
news.summary: In Baltimore on December 2, 2024, Historic Ships will commemorate the 83rd anniversary of the Japanese Attack on Pearl Harbor. The event will take place on the last surviving warship afloat that witnessed the attack in Hawaii in 1941. This ceremony honors those affected by the tragic events of December 7, 1941.

news.headline: Teamsters file eighth ULP charge against Bigfoot Beverages after company uses scabs to decertify union workers.
news.summary: In Eugene, Oregon on December 2, 2024, an eighth unfair labor practice charge has been filed by Teamsters against Bigfoot Beverages. The company has been accused of illegally attempting to decertify the Teamsters by employing scab workers in a shameless move. This action by Bigfoot Beverages was deemed false and unlawful as they tried to withdraw recognition from the Teamsters. The company's use of scabs in this attempt has sparked controversy and led to further legal action with the ULP charge.

news.headline: Fed's Waller: The yield curve can be inverted for good reasons if markets think inflation and therefore rates will be lower in the future.
Iraq halts all operations at Basra oil refinery due to overloaded fuel oil storage tanks - Refinery Officials.
Bioscience sector in the US generates $3 trillion for economy - new report by BIO and CSBA.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, the Biotechnology Innovation Organization (BIO) and the Council of State Bioscience Associations (CSBA) unveiled updated statistics concerning the economic contributions of the U.S. bioscience sector. The data encompasses both national and state-specific figures, illustrating the industry's financial prowess and regional influences. This release sheds light on the industry's impact, highlighting key metrics such as revenue generated, job creation, and investment trends across various states. The report offers valuable insights into the sector's economic performance, emphasizing its significance in driving innovation and supporting jobs within the biotechnology field.

news.headline: Info-Tech Research Group emphasizes agile procurement methods for quicker decisions in commoditizing tech markets.
news.summary: Recent research findings from Info-Tech Research Group reveal that with technology markets becoming increasingly commoditized, organizations can benefit from adopting more intelligent and flexible procurement strategies. By doing so, they can make faster and more efficient purchasing choices in a rapidly evolving market marked by continual innovation and disruption. This information emphasizes the importance of staying ahead in a competitive landscape where timing and adaptability are crucial.

news.headline: Optinose, a pharmaceutical company, to present at Piper Sandler Healthcare Conf on Dec 5, 2024 at 1:30 pm ET.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, in Yardley, Pennsylvania, Optinose, a pharmaceutical company traded on the NASDAQ under the ticker OPTN, shared that their management team will provide a company overview and business update at the upcoming Piper Sandler 36th Annual Healthcare Conference. The presentation is scheduled for December 5, 2024, at 1:30 p.m. Eastern Time. Optinose specializes in patients under treatment by ear, nose, and throat (ENT) as well as allergy specialists.

Dr. Barrazueta is a respected orthopedic surgeon who has made significant contributions to the field.

Bartlik, MD, was recognized as a Pinnacle Lifetime Member in The Inner Circle for her significant contributions to Innovating Integrative Psychiatry. news.summary: In November, Bitcoin reached record-breaking highs, leading to a significant increase in revenues for miners. This surge resulted in substantial profits for publicly traded mining companies.

Kisselman was recognized as a Top Pinnacle Professional in The Inner Circle for his achievements as a respected Geologist and Entrepreneur. news.headline: MOC Imbalance
34 Lives rescues and transplants 34 donated kidneys to save lives, achieving a significant milestone.
news.summary: In a recent announcement made in West Lafayette, Indiana on December 2, 2024, 34 Lives, a Public Benefit Company, shared a major achievement. The organization focuses on rescuing donated kidneys that could potentially remain unused. They proudly revealed that they have successfully completed the 34th rescue and transplant of a kidney. This milestone signifies the significant impact of their work in providing a second chance to 34 donor kidneys, ultimately offering hope to those in need of a transplant.

news.headline: Investigation launched by Edelson Lechtzin LLP into Symbotic Inc. (NYSE: SYM) for federal securities law violations. Contact the firm with relevant info.
news.summary: In Newtown, Pennsylvania on December 2, 2024, Edelson Lechtzin LLP has begun examining possible breaches of federal securities regulations concerning Symbotic, Inc. ("Symbotic" or "the Company") (NASDAQ: SYM). This investigation stems from claims that Symbotic may have provided deceptive business details, leading to concerns about compliance with securities laws.

news.headline: GBank Financial Holdings Inc. adds A.G. Burnett to Board of Directors, effective Dec 1, 2024. (Numbers: Dec 2, 2024, OTCQX: GBFH)
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, in Las Vegas, GBank Financial Holdings Inc. disclosed the appointment of A.G. Burnett to the Board of Directors of its subsidiary GBank. This newly elected member officially joined the board on December 1, 2024, expanding the board's expertise and providing valuable insights to the company. GBank Financial Holdings Inc., trading on the OTCQX under the symbol GBFH, is optimistic about the contributions that Mr. Burnett will bring to the Bank's strategic decision-making processes.

news.headline: Actor Sean Astin, American University alumni, to be Fall Commencement speaker on Dec. 15 for Class of 2024.

Astin, famous for roles such as Mikey Walsh in The Goonies and Samwise Gamgee in the Lord of the Rings trilogy, will join the celebration. This event marks a significant moment for approximately [total number of students in Class of 2024] students graduating from American University.

news.headline: Haig Partners advised on sale of Advantage Toyota and Ball Toyota to Victory Automotive Group; now Victory Toyota of Barboursville & Charleston.
news.summary: Haig Partners LLC, a prominent buy-sell advisory firm for auto, heavy truck, and RV dealers in the US, recently acted as the exclusive sell-side advisor for the sale of Advantage Toyota and Ball Toyota. The dealerships were acquired by Victory Automotive Group ("Victory"). Formerly owned by Shawn Ball and his brother David, Advantage Toyota, now known as Victory Toyota of Barboursville, and Ball Toyota, now Victory Toyota of Charleston, are now under Victory's ownership. Victory Automotive Group, spearheaded by Jeff C, finalized the acquisition under the guidance of Haig Partners LLC.

news.headline: Elon Musk's X social network sees value rise with Fidelity fund investment.
ADGM's asset management sector sees exponential growth in Q3 2024, aligning with Abu Dhabi's 6.6% non-oil GDP growth in Q2.
news.summary: ADGM, the international financial centre of Abu Dhabi, reported unprecedented growth in Q3 of 2024, aligning with Abu Dhabi's economic growth of 6.6% in non-oil GDP in Q2 of 2024. Key metrics showed exceptional achievements, highlighting ADGM's pivotal role in diversifying Abu Dhabi's economy and solidifying its global position in finance, investment, and innovation. The Chairman of ADGM, Ahmed Jasim Al Zaabi, attributed the success to ADGM's world-class ecosystem, attracting businesses and investors. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.summary: On December 2, 2024, in Chicago, Launch Consulting, a prominent AI-first digital transformation consultancy under The Planet Group, appointed John Cipolla as its new President. This move signifies a significant step in the company's leadership team.

news.headline: Fed's Waller: Average inflation targeting framework was very backward looking and blew up very quickly.
